title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Instructional Designer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
